projects.title: Lake Erie Algal Bloom Forecasting
projects.challenges: Fusing multi-spectral satellite imagery with in-situ buoy sensor streams; modeling nonlinear nutrient dynamics under shifting climate baselines; running ensembles at 30-minute cadence on bursty cloud GPU.

projects.title: EHR Phenotyping for Rare Disease
projects.challenges: De-identifying 4M+ unstructured clinical notes inside the secure enclave; adapting open-weight clinical LLMs to UToledo's note conventions; auditing for cohort bias before deployment.

projects.title: Glass Furnace Predictive Maintenance
projects.challenges: Sensor drift over 8000-hour furnace campaigns; very few labeled failure events; transferring models across furnace generations without retraining from scratch.

projects.title: Tumor Detection in Multi-modal MRI
projects.challenges: Aligning T1, T2, and DWI sequences across scanners; training on small UTMC cohorts without overfitting; producing radiologist-readable saliency that survives clinical scrutiny.

projects.title: Battery Materials Discovery via Foundation Models
projects.challenges: Pre-training on materials-science literature without contaminating the held-out validation set; coupling LLM hypothesis generation to DFT verification at scale; budgeting Ohio Supercomputer Center hours.

projects.title: Secure Digital Twin for Nuclear Engineering
projects.challenges: Provenance-tracked training pipelines that meet DOE security requirements; tamper-evident model artifacts; running sensitive simulations only inside the secure enclave with full audit logging.

projects.title: Trustworthy Clinical AI Auditing Toolkit
projects.challenges: Defining bias metrics that map to UTMC's patient demographics; building report templates that radiologists and IRB reviewers can both read; integrating with the MLOps stack without slowing research velocity.

projects.title: Watershed Regulation NLP Synthesis
projects.challenges: Aligning state vs. federal regulatory language; structured extraction from PDFs of inconsistent quality; producing summaries that hold up to legal review.
